name: Pistachio Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the chicken breast halves between sheets of waxed paper or plastic wrap to an even thickness.
2. Melt butter in a small sauté pan over medium heat.
3. Add mushrooms and chopped pistachios; cook until mushrooms release moisture and are almost dry.
4. Stir in breadcrumbs, then remove from heat.
5. Season the chicken breasts with salt and pepper.
6. Place an equal amount of mushroom mixture on each breast, roll up tightly, secure with a toothpick, and transfer to a baking pan.
7. In a small saucepan, dissolve cornstarch in white wine by stirring over low heat for 2 minutes.
8. Add butter, apricot jam, and chutney; continue stirring until well combined and slightly thickened.
9. Remove from heat and set aside.
10. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
11. Bake the breasts for 15 minutes.
12. Baste with the apricot sauce and bake an additional 15-20 minutes, or until cooked through.
13. Transfer the chicken to a heated serving platter, garnish with orange slices and whole pistachios.
14. Drizzle remaining sauce over the chicken and serve hot.
